regenerated_by: manual-author Plan 80/81 SP01 T-5; updated Plan 84 SP01 T-7 (2026-05-11) for per-session checkpoint paths (R-37 foundation mirror)
_provenance: Initial enumeration per packet §3.16 + Agent 5 inventory. T-10 (l3-registry-audit librarian capability) replaces this with automated regeneration walking ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.*.plist + ~/.claude/hooks/*.sh weekly.
_purpose: Master enumeration of writers (SessionEnd hooks, UserPromptSubmit hooks, launchd labels) + their write paths. Consumed by (a) l3-pause-helper.sh at runtime to coordinate pauses, (b) librarian l3-registry-audit at manifest-author time for static lint flagging Incident-β-class omissions (plan declares scope_paths overlapping a writer's write paths but doesn't declare a pause for that writer).

writers._notes: Auto-commits changes to ~/.claude-plans/ and ~/.claude/ git surfaces at session end. Pause via canary-editing.lock sentinel; live helper at ~/.claude/hooks/auto-commit-surfaces.sh checks for existence before running.

writers.sp09_incident: Incident β (2026-04-28). Env var CLAUDE_MEM_DISABLE_OK=1 covers SessionEnd consolidation ONLY. Auto-memory consolidation paths invoked from UserPromptSubmit, manual save calls, and librarian consolidation continue to run regardless. This was the structural gap that allowed Session 17 close-out auto-memory edit on MEMORY.md to consume T-13-postmortem.nonce.
writers._notes: claude-mem SessionEnd-driven memory consolidation. R-24 enforces this hook stays running unless CLAUDE_MEM_DISABLE_OK=1 set. See feedback_keep_claude_mem_running.md.

Auto-memory writes invoked from UserPromptSubmit context (separate from SessionEnd path). This writer was the load-bearing surface in Plan 71 SP09 Incident β: mid-session auto-memory edits consumed task-bound nonces issued for unrelated targets. CLAUDE_MEM_DISABLE_OK=1 does NOT pause this writer (covers SessionEnd only). Carve-out in G1 (live-guard.sh exempt_paths declaration for ~/.claude/projects/**) is the v1 mitigation; per-task nonce affinity (basename-match-env) is the structural fix.
writers._plan_84_sp01_update: 2026-05-11 Plan 84 SP01 T-2: prompt-context.sh 35% silent stub now writes to per-session path $HOOKS_STATE/sessions/<sid>/checkpoint.md (legacy bare path retired). Dated archives are session-register.sh's responsibility (writer #5, sessions/** covers).

writers._notes: R-26 enforcement: context-pressure 45%/48% thresholds inject re-firing UserPromptSubmit mandate to invoke /session-checkpoint. Writes to ~/.claude/hooks/state/. Plan 71 master manifest exempt_paths (T-14) MUST include ~/.claude/hooks/state/** to avoid Incident-β-class denial of legitimate checkpoint writes during Plan-71-context sessions. Closes SP07 OQ-H.
writers._plan_84_sp01_update: 2026-05-11 Plan 84 SP01 T-2: /session-checkpoint skill + prompt-context.sh R-26 mandate now write to per-session path $HOOKS_STATE/sessions/<sid>/checkpoint.md (legacy bare path retired). Dated archive writes (checkpoint-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.md) belong to writer #5 (session-register-deregister) which already declares sessions/** scope.

writers._notes: Session lifecycle tracking. Multi-session coordination per Plan 42 R-42.
Plan 79 cron — vault git-backup. Hard prereq for Plan 81 SP04, NOT SP01.
Plan 32 autonomous orchestration. Job-runner.sh post-dispatch verifier shipped 2026-04-25.

_promotion_gate_reviewers._note: com.promotion-gate-review.*.plist labels (com.promotion-gate-review.may1-r38-r39-r40, may4-r43-r44-r45, may5-plan59, may8-r33, may18-r46, may19-r47) and com.plan67-obs-gate.*.plist labels are short-lived calendar-gated reviewers. They write to vault Logs/ for the duration of their observation window then self-deregister. Not enumerated as registry writers because their write paths are bounded (single-day reviewer outputs) and their pause-mechanism would be gate-redundant (window expires before any plan's pause matters).

_post_tool_use_advisory._notes: Auto-sync of plan tasks.md status via <!-- task-done: NN/T-M --> markers in backlog-progress files. Fires on PostToolUse Edit/Write. Per feedback_tasks_md_autosync. Writes to ~/.claude-plans/ which is gate-free for live-guard purposes (gate triggers on $HOME/.claude/, not .claude-plans).
_post_tool_use_advisory._advisory_note: PostToolUse-fire hooks fire AFTER pre-write succeeded. They reactively log/sync; they do NOT write to gate-protected paths during the pre-write decision window. pause_mechanism is not applicable in the L3 writer-pause sense — these hooks have no pause-state to manage. Listed here for completeness (so l3-registry-audit drift detection sees them) but excluded from layer_3 helper scope. Use carve_out_in_g1 for their write paths if they need exempt status.

Listed here for l3-registry-audit drift detection but excluded from primary writers[] to avoid pause_mechanism semantic dilution.
